LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_InfiniteAmmo_Desc: Weapons do not consume any ammo as long as you have that ammo type in your inventory.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_InfiniteReserve_Desc: Weapons do not consume any ammo from the inventory but still need to reload. You have infinite reserve ammo as long as there is one in your inventory.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_InfiniteTurretAmmo_Desc: Turrets never run out of ammo. They still need to be loaded once initially.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_InfiniteGrenades_Desc: Thrown weapons like grenades are not consumed on use.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_PlayerOnly_Desc: Infinite ammo settings only apply to player-controlled pawns and turrets. Enemy factions will still consume ammo normally.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_BalanceMode_Desc: Enables balance changes for infinite ammo mode.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_LimitStackSize_Desc: Sets all ammo stack limits to 1.
LanguageData.CEInfiniteAmmo_LimitSpawns_Desc: Prevents spawning multiple ammo items. Raids, drops, and loot will only spawn 1 of each ammo type.
